This is the film adaptation of the broadway MUSICAL. So yes, it is a MUSICAL. They have scenes of people obviously singing and the “dance break” in the trailer. The title screen even has a music note in “Mean Girls.” Renee Rapp, who plays Regina, also played Regina on broadway. They aren’t trying to remake it or make a “better version.” They simply made the broadway musical into a movie.
